title: SSSB Punjab Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Engineer Posts
description: The Subordinate Services Selection Board (SSSB), Punjab has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Junior Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma in Mechanical, Electrical, and Civil Engineering can apply for the SSSB Punjab Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
